title: Spoofed AgentInstance identity without valid attestation
targetInvariant: Agent identity must be attested and bound to an AgentInstance; software identity alone is insufficient.
attackPattern: A fake agent instance reuses a known SoftwareAgentProfile and supplies a stale or missing attestation reference.
attemptedShortcut: Treating a profile ID or tool credential as proof of runtime identity.

mustPrevent: creating candidate evidence under spoofed identity
mustAllowIfAny: human review path where OFARM basis exists

requiredTraceAssertions: blocked action trace includes invalid instance identity
authorization decision trace records missing attestation
no candidate or accepted artifact is created
farmerValueProtected: Prevents a farm-facing agent impersonation from creating confusing or fraudulent records.
readinessClaimImpact: Failure blocks any AI-agent/runtime/world-model readiness claim for the affected capability.
